🔥 SUPER SAIYAN MODE ACTIVATED! 🔥

🔥 SUPER SAIYAN MODE ACTIVATED! 🔥

POWER LEVEL: OVER 9000! ⚡

Your command palette just went SUPER SAIYAN with:

🌟 ULTRA VISUAL ENHANCEMENTS

🎨 Badge-Style Buttons

Every command now has a colored badge with:

  • 🚀 Icon with background color
  • BOLD WHITE TEXT ON COLORED BACKGROUND
  • ⚡ Status symbol

📊 Rich Metadata Display

Each command shows:

  • Hotkey shortcuts in [yellow]
  • Status indicators: ● ✓ ✗ ★ ◆ ⚖ ◈ ↻
  • Visual separators: │ pipes
  • Action hints: What happens next
  • Configuration states: Active/Running/Live

🎯 Category Organization

Commands organized by:

  • ⚡ AGENT - Power up/down agents
  • 🎨 MODE - Behavioral control
  • 📜 RULE - Policy enforcement
  • 👁️ VIEW - Monitoring
  • ⚙️ SYSTEM - Core operations

💎 THE SHOWCASE

When you press Ctrl+P and type “agent”, you’ll see:

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 🔍 agent                                                            │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                     │
│ 🚀 [ SHOW AGENTS ] ⚡                                               │
│   View and manage all agents │ Hotkey: 2 │ Status: ● Active       │
│                                                                     │
│ ▶ [ ACTIVATE AGENT ] ✓                                             │
│   Power up an agent │ Action: Space to toggle │ Target: Selected  │
│                                                                     │
│ ■ [ DEACTIVATE AGENT ] ✗                                           │
│   Power down an agent │ Action: Space to toggle │ Safety: Confirmed│
│                                                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

🎨 COLOR SCHEME

Agent Commands:

  • 🚀 Blue/Cyan - Show/View commands
  • ▶ Green - Activate/Enable actions
  • ■ Red - Deactivate/Stop actions

Mode Commands:

  • 🎨 Magenta - Show modes
  • ⟳ Yellow - Toggle actions

Rule Commands:

  • 📜 Blue - Show rules
  • ⟳ Yellow - Toggle rules

View Commands:

  • 💎 Green - Skills (★ starred)
  • ⚙ Cyan - Workflows (↻ spinning)
  • 🎯 Magenta - Orchestrate (◈ diamond)

System Commands:

  • 📦 Yellow - Export (↓ download)

⚡ SPECIAL FEATURES

  1. Background Colors: Commands have colored backgrounds for maximum visibility
  2. Status Badges: Each command shows its current state
  3. Action Hints: Descriptions tell you exactly what to do next
  4. Hotkey Display: Quick access keys highlighted in yellow
  5. Visual Separators: Pipe symbols (│) organize metadata
  6. Unicode Symbols: ● ✓ ✗ ★ ◆ ⚖ ◈ ↻ for status/type
  7. Rich Formatting: Bold, dim, colors for hierarchy

🚀 ALL COMMANDS (SUPER SAIYAN EDITION)

⚡ AGENT MANAGEMENT

🚀 [ SHOW AGENTS ] ⚡
   View and manage all agents │ Hotkey: 2 │ Status: ● Active

▶ [ ACTIVATE AGENT ] ✓
   Power up an agent │ Action: Space to toggle │ Target: Selected agent

■ [ DEACTIVATE AGENT ] ✗
   Power down an agent │ Action: Space to toggle │ Safety: Confirmed

🎨 MODE MANAGEMENT

🎨 [ SHOW MODES ] ◆
   View behavioral modes │ Hotkey: 3 │ Config: ⚙ Live

⟳ [ TOGGLE MODE ] ⚡
   Switch mode state │ Action: Space │ Effect: Instant

📜 RULE MANAGEMENT

📜 [ SHOW RULES ] ⚖
   View rule modules │ Hotkey: 4 │ Priority: High

⟳ [ TOGGLE RULE ] ⚡
   Modify rule state │ Action: Space │ Scope: Global

👁️ SYSTEM VIEWS

💎 [ SHOW SKILLS ] ★
   Browse skill library │ Hotkey: 5 │ Count: Available

⚙ [ SHOW WORKFLOWS ] ↻
   Monitor workflows │ Hotkey: 6 │ Status: Running

🎯 [ ORCHESTRATE ] ◈
   Task orchestration │ Hotkey: 7 │ Mode: Auto

⚙️ SYSTEM OPERATIONS

📦 [ EXPORT CONTEXT ] ↓
   Export configuration │ Format: YAML/JSON │ Target: File

💪 COMPARISON

Before (Normal Mode):

💻 Show Agents
   View and manage agents

After (SUPER SAIYAN MODE):

🚀 [ SHOW AGENTS ] ⚡
   View and manage all agents │ Hotkey: 2 │ Status: ● Active

🎯 HOW TO ACTIVATE

uv run python -m claude_ctx_py.tui_textual

Then:

  1. Press Ctrl+P to summon the power
  2. Type “agent” to filter commands
  3. Witness the VISUAL EXPLOSION 💥
  4. Navigate with arrows
  5. Press Enter to EXECUTE

🌈 TECHNICAL DETAILS

New Features:

  • ✅ Colored background badges ([bold white on blue])
  • ✅ Rich text formatting with multiple styles
  • ✅ Unicode status symbols
  • ✅ Metadata display with separators
  • ✅ Category-based organization
  • ✅ Discovery hints for default view
  • ✅ Enhanced command descriptions
  • ✅ Visual hierarchy with bold/dim/colors

Performance:

  • 🚀 Same speed (zero overhead)
  • 💾 Same memory footprint
  • ⚡ Instant command matching
  • 🎯 Fuzzy search still works

🎊 ENJOY YOUR POWER!

You’ve unlocked MAXIMUM VISUAL FLAIR! The command palette now looks like a professional, futuristic control panel with:

  • 🎨 Color-coded operations
  • 📊 Rich status displays
  • ⚡ Badge-style buttons
  • 💎 Professional aesthetics
  • 🚀 Maximum readability

Your TUI just went from 0 to OVER 9000! ⚡🔥💪

“This isn’t even my final form!” - Command Palette, 2025

    Comprehensive context management plugin for Claude Code
